description: This file defines negation in the Future Continuous tense in Njo Viri (Balanda). Future continuous negation expresses actions that will not be ongoing at a future time.

general_principle.structure: Future continuous negation in Balanda is formed by retaining the future marker 'le-', the auxiliary 'dho' (be), and the progressive prefix 'ti-', and adding the negation marker 'gba' sentence-finally.

negation_structure.notes: Used to express that an action will not be in progress in the future. | The future marker 'le-' must attach to 'dho'; The auxiliary 'dho' must be present; The progressive prefix 'ti-' must be present; The negation marker 'gba' must appear sentence-final

tense_and_aspect_distinction.structure: Future continuous negation encodes both tense and aspect.
tense_and_aspect_distinction.notes: 'le-' encodes future tense; 'dho' functions as auxiliary 'be'; 'ti-' encodes progressive aspect

word_order_rules.notes: Subject; le-dho; ti-Verb; Object / Complement; gba

error_constraints.structure: Do not omit 'le-'; Do not omit 'dho'; Do not omit 'ti-'; Do not use the copula 'ma'; Do not use 'dheki'; Do not place 'gba' anywhere except sentence-final

output: I will not be eating fish
She will not be drinking water

input: Danda ledho titeli muru famvara gba
output: We will not be sleeping on the bed
Uku will not be going
Ngande will not be coming home

input: Ndi ledho tinonö gbi difo gba
output: They will not be walking in the compound
She will not be running fast

input: Uku ledho timande gbi njü gba
output: Uku will not be working in the garden

input: Wiki ledho timoliki gbi difo gba
output: The child will not be playing in the compound
I will not be watching the dog

input: Ne ledho tivele njo balanda gba
output: I will not be speaking Balanda
The girl will not be writing words
I will not be reading a book
He will not be thinking about it
They will not be knowing it
I will not be asking them

input: Ngande ledho tivele zi ndi gba
output: Ngande will not be telling them

input: Wilii ledho tikeye ti naa ni gba
output: The girl will not be calling her mother
I will not be loving you

input: Ni ledho timaguku ti kpörö gba
output: He will not be fearing the snake
She will not be hating him
Ngande will not be surprising him
He will not be seeming calm
The girl will not be tying the shoe
He will not be cutting the pot
I will not be pulling the door
We will not be pushing the box
The girl will not be washing the shoe
I will not be hiding the beads
Ngande will not be building a house
I will not be creating words
She will not be changing the words
I will not be turning the door
We will not be adding money
I will not be describing Balanda
They will not be helping the poor
Ngande will not be initiating the project
I will not be contributing to the project
The girl will not be separating trash
We will not be upholding the law
I will not be wanting water
She will not be giving money
I will not be finding money
Uku will not be trying the cloth
Ngande will not be leaving home
I will not be arriving in Wau
He will not be sharpening the knife
Ngande will not be imitating adults
We will not be starting the project
He will not be falling
